headline: Telix Strengthens Board with Additional Director Appointments
summary: MELBOURNE, Australia and INDIANAPOLIS, April 09, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited (ASX: TLX, NASDAQ: TLX, “Telix”) today announces two additional Non-Executive Director (NED) appointments, effective May 11, 20261, as part of Board expansion and succession planning: Maria Rivas, MD is an experienced public company board director and S&P 100 senior pharmaceutical executive with more than 25 years’ experience in late-stage clinical development, commercialization and governance

raw.headline: Telix Strengthens Board with Additional Director Appointments

headline: Tired of AI and Oil? Buy the Robot.
summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) is currently hovering around the $450 mark, a level that has historically acted as a psychological and technical floor. For an investor, the question isn't just "is it cheap?" (it almost never is), but "is the premium still justified?”.

headline: Assessing Medtronic (MDT) Valuation After Stealth AXiS FDA Clearance For Cranial And ENT Surgery
summary: Why the Stealth AXiS FDA Clearance Matters for Medtronic (MDT) Medtronic (MDT) recently secured U.S. FDA clearance for its AI-enabled Stealth AXiS surgical system in cranial and ENT procedures, extending beyond prior spine use and opening additional opportunities in computer assisted and robotic surgery. See our latest analysis for Medtronic. Despite the Stealth AXiS clearance and the recent MiniMed IPO, Medtronic’s 30 day share price return of 4.93% and 90 day share price return of 13.38%...

headline: Here is Why Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) Ranks Among the 15 Best Low Volatility Blue Chip Stocks to Buy Now
summary: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) is included among the 15 Best Low Volatility Blue Chip Stocks to Buy Now. On April 7, Citi lifted its price recommendation on Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) to $285 from $274. The firm kept a Buy rating as it updated its outlook for the medical technology group ahead of Q1.
